title: Dungeons Mace
description: This pack simply changes the minecraft mace into the mace from minecraft dungeons!
body:
![RP logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2f1dde469ea8a0805453ec8e6130e5ef258b05f3.png)

This pack simply changes the minecraft mace into the mace from minecraft dungeons!

This also affects the Heavy core, which now reflects the new look of the mace's head piece!

Note that this pack only works on versions 24w11a and above! It's only marked as 1.20.4 as it's the latest version modrinth currently allows.
